title: The Rampur Raza Library Act, 1975
full_text: The Rampur Raza Library Act, 1975 रामपुर रजा लाइब्रेरी अधिनियम,1975 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 197522 Act Number: 22 Enactment Date: 1975-05-09 Act Year: 1975 Short Title: The Rampur Raza Library Act, 1975 Hindi Title: रामपुर रजा लाइब्रेरी अधिनियम,1975 Long Title: An Act to declare the Rampur Raza Library to be an institution of national importance and to provide for its administration and matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Culture Enforcement Date: 01-07-1975 Notification: 1st July, 1975, vide notification No. G.S.R. 354(E), dated 26th June, 1975, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i).
